pi-eink.description: Build, configure, and deploy the Pi Zero e-ink display client for birdnet-collage.

deploy.description: rsync repo to Pi and restart systemd service.
deploy.template: Run (requires $PI_USER and $PI_HOST set — see .env.example): rsync -az --delete --exclude __pycache__ --exclude .git --exclude '*.pyc' --exclude .pytest_cache . $PI_USER@$PI_HOST:/opt/birdnet-collage-eink/ && ssh $PI_USER@$PI_HOST 'sudo systemctl restart birdnet-eink && sleep 2 && journalctl -u birdnet-eink --no-pager -n 30'

logs.description: Show the last 50 lines of the Pi's service logs.

status.description: Check if service is running on the Pi.
status.template: Run (requires $PI_USER and $PI_HOST set): ssh $PI_USER@$PI_HOST 'systemctl status birdnet-eink --no-pager'

simulate.description: Run the app locally with the simulator driver for testing.
simulate.template: Run: DISPLAY_DRIVER=simulator SIMULATOR_OUTDIR=/tmp/eink-sim COLLAGE_URL=http://localhost:8081 POLL_INTERVAL=60 LOOKBACK_HOURS=24 LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG python3 -m src
